---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case. "I'm trying to do X, but Engram makes me do Y."

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. API sketch is welcome but not required.

```python
# rough shape
await memory.do_the_thing(...)
```

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve this — including not changing Engram (e.g., handling it in user code).

## Roadmap context

If your idea aligns with an item in [README.md → Roadmap](../../README.md#roadmap) or in [README.md → Where contributions are most welcome](../../README.md#where-contributions-are-most-welcome), call it out — that helps prioritisation.

## Are you willing to contribute?

Optional but appreciated. "Yes, with guidance" is a great answer.
